'''layoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zain|zain]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zain|zain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| layoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyeseth|læyeseth]] || [[word:læyesej|læyesej]] || [[word:læyesesh|læyesesh]] || [[word:læyese|læyese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:layoyosoth|layoyosoth]] || [[word:layoyosoj|layoyosoj]] || [[word:layoyososh|layoyososh]] || [[word:layoyoso|layoyoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:layosoth|layosoth]] || [[word:layosoj|layosoj]] || [[word:layososh|layososh]] || [[word:layoso|layoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:layofsoth|layofsoth]] || [[word:layofsoj|layofsoj]] || [[word:layofsosh|layofsosh]] || [[word:layofsof|layofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layosotho|layosotho]] || [[word:layosojo|layosojo]] || [[word:layososho|layososho]] || [[word:layosoko|layosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layosoth|layosoth]] || [[word:layosoj|layosoj]] || [[word:layososh|layososh]] || [[word:layoso|layoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layosothol|layosothol]] || [[word:layosojol|layosojol]] || [[word:layososhol|layososhol]] || [[word:layosokol|layosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layosothotho|layosothotho]] || [[word:layosojojo|layosojojo]] || [[word:layososhosho|layososhosho]] || [[word:layosoko|layosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layosothon|layosothon]] || [[word:layosojon|layosojon]] || [[word:layososhon|layososhon]] || [[word:layosokon|layosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layosothoro|layosothoro]] || [[word:layosojoro|layosojoro]] || [[word:layososhoro|layososhoro]] || [[word:layosokoro|layosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
